query: direct on-camera flash snapshot harsh shadow red eye unflattering party
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: harsh flash — direct on-camera flash, red-eye, party snapshot aesthetic, hard shadows, unflattering documentary realism

response.objective_caption: A close-up portrait of a person with tousled brown hair wearing a brown jacket over a dark shirt. The subject faces the camera directly. The background features a dark area on the left and a warm orange-toned vertical surface on the right. Bright overhead light catches the hair and shoulders while casting shadows across the upper portion of the face.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A confrontational close-up portrait of a person with tousled brown hair, wearing a brown jacket over a dark shirt, staring directly at the camera with furrowed brows and an angry expression. Harsh overhead lighting creates deep shadows across the face and within the eye sockets, amplifying the hostile mood against a background that transitions from dark on the left to warm orange on the right.
